summary: Regression + new-feature testing after Sony Music redesign. 38/38 backend pytest pass (added 13 new tests for new admin + 22-seed + Jun/Jul 2026 date range). Frontend: new admin login works, redesigned status badges render with correct colors (Finalizado=emerald, Em Análise=blue, Pendente=amber - NOT red), and the new Tabela/Timeline calendar feature works correctly on License In, License Out and Sony/Sony with all required testids, month headers (Junho 2026 / Julho 2026), day count badges, side-panel day list, and a now-enabled next-month arrow.

ui_bugs.issue: After logging in with the NEW admin pablo.duarte@sonymusic.com, the header shows 'Pablo Duartel' (legacy name with extra 'l') instead of 'Pablo Duarte'. Email and auth are correct; this is purely the user.nome field stored in the DB. Likely cause: seed_admin() updates the existing admin record's email/password but does not refresh the 'nome' from a prior seeded value (or both admins were seeded with the same nome 'Pablo Duartel').

action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW: In backend/seed_data.py seed_admin, also upsert the 'nome' field for the new admin (set nome='Pablo Duarte' when ADMIN_EMAIL=='pablo.duarte@sonymusic.com'), so the header reflects the new admin's actual name instead of 'Pablo Duartel'.

Re-confirm (carry-over): CORS combination allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' from default env is invalid per spec; tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit origins in production (not blocking - app uses Bearer header, not cookies).
critical_code_review_comments: ContractCalendar correctly drives month state and respects 'previsao' (dd/mm/yyyy) when computing per-day counts; next-month is enabled because seed spans Jun+Jul 2026.
ViewToggle has both data-testid='*-view-toggle-table' and '*-view-toggle-calendar' for License In, License Out and Sony/Sony - all verified clickable and switching state correctly.
Status badge palette in index.css (emerald/blue/amber) now correctly overrides the global red Sony theme via !important - verified on Dashboard recent-activity AND License In table.
Seed_data._future_date produces dates spread across June and July 2026 (11 in June + 11 in July for License In and License Out; 10/12 split for Sony-Sony). All 22 contracts/type returned by API.
Backend CRUD endpoints unchanged this iteration (verified by 38/38 pytest including full create/get/update/delete + persistence checks).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestNewAdminLogin + TestSeed22Contracts: 13 new tests covering new admin auth, 22-contract seed counts, Jun/Jul 2026 date range, both-months span, and auth-required on /licenses-in,/licenses-out,/sony-sony)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows (new admin login, dashboard live stats=22, badge colors regression, License In/Out/Sony-Sony calendar toggle + month header + day-list panel + next-month=Julho 2026 enabled, switch back to table). CRUD UI smoke (create from Novo Pedido) was attempted but not asserted in this iteration script - iteration_1 already proved CRUD works end-to-end, and backend pytest re-confirmed all 7 entity CRUD paths.

test_credentials: NEW Admin: pablo.duarte@sonymusic.com / 123456 (verified login + dashboard). Legacy Admin: pablo.duartel@sonymusic.com / sony2025 (still works). Source: /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed required. Verified backend seed creates exactly 22 contracts each for license-in/license-out/sony-sony with dates in 06/2026 or 07/2026, and that License In spans BOTH June 2026 and July 2026 (test_seed_spans_both_months).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - run: pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. The login form uses data-testid 'login-email-input', 'login-password-input', 'login-submit-btn'. Calendar testids follow pattern '<page>-view-toggle-table|calendar', '<page>-calendar', '<page>-calendar-day-<N>', '<page>-calendar-day-list', '<page>-calendar-next-month' for page in {license-in, license-out, sony-sony}. Logout: click data-testid='user-menu-trigger' then '[data-testid="logout-btn"]' (dropdown). License In table has a 'Novo Pedido' button (text-based selector). The minor user-name display bug for new admin is non-blocking.
rca of the issue: No critical bug surfaced. The single LOW-priority finding: header shows 'Pablo Duartel' for the new admin. Reproduction: login with pablo.duarte@sonymusic.com / 123456 and inspect the user-menu-trigger top-right. Root cause hypothesis: in backend/seed_data.py seed_admin only ensures the admin record exists with the new email/password but reuses the legacy nome 'Pablo Duartel' (with extra l). Mitigation: have seed_admin upsert nome='Pablo Duarte' when ADMIN_EMAIL matches pablo.duarte@sonymusic.com (idempotent update of the nome field on every startup).
